response.justification: Candidate is an experienced full-stack/web developer with strong TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang background, but the resume shows critical gaps against this role's hard requirements: no Japanese language proficiency (native-level required), no demonstrated Linux kernel modification experience, only brief and dated C/C++ exposure (NI LabWindows, 2014-2015), and no embedded networking or security domain experience (MACsec, 802.1X, NETCONF, SNMP, switch chips). The profile is mismatched with embedded LAN-switch security firmware development.
strengths: Long, varied software engineering career with senior/staff-level roles
Some C/C++ experience at National Instruments on a C IDE product
Strong software craftsmanship practices: TDD, CI/CD, testing
concerns: No Japanese language ability listed (native-level is a hard requirement)
No embedded firmware, LAN-switch, or networking security experience (MACsec, 802.1X, NETCONF)
No Linux kernel investigation or source-modification experience; C work is minimal and a decade old

key_factors.factor: Minimal/dated C and no Linux kernel work
